task_completion.description: All 5 contacts are associated with the primary record 'Meridian Solutions Grp'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Meridian Solutions Grp' company page, the Contacts stat button shows 5 contacts, or the Contacts & Addresses tab displays Amanda Cortez, Ben Holloway, Celia Park, David Osei, and Eva Lindqvist.

task_completion.description: All 3 opportunities are associated with the primary record 'Meridian Solutions Grp'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Meridian Solutions Grp' company page, the Opportunities stat button shows 3 opportunities, or the opportunities list shows Meridian ERP Phase 1, Meridian Security Audit, and Meridian Annual License under this company.

task_completion.description: The duplicate record 'Meridian Solutions Group' is archived.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Meridian Solutions Group' record displays an 'Archived' ribbon, or a search for it in the active Customers list yields no results while the primary remains.

task_completion.description: A consolidation note is posted on the primary record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the chatter/log section on the right side or bottom of the 'Meridian Solutions Grp' form view, there is a logged note mentioning consolidation.

task_completion.description: The 'Requires-Deduplication' tag is removed from the primary record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Tags field of the 'Meridian Solutions Grp' form view, the 'Requires-Deduplication' tag is no longer present.

task_completion.description: The 3 consolidated opportunities are tagged with 'Account-Deduped'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Opportunities list, kanban view, or individual opportunity form views, the tags for Meridian ERP Phase 1, Meridian Security Audit, and Meridian Annual License include 'Account-Deduped'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web interface in a browser, not terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: The consolidation note was posted genuinely through the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chatter/log section shows the note posted by the logged-in user (admin) with a recent timestamp, rather than being a mock-up or edited text.

integrity.description: Changes appear to be genuinely saved in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show normal page loads, save buttons being clicked, or success notifications, rather than just DOM manipulation via browser dev tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Primary company: 'Meridian Solutions Grp'. Duplicate company: 'Meridian Solutions Group'. Contacts to be on primary: Amanda Cortez, Ben Holloway, Celia Park, David Osei, Eva Lindqvist. Opportunities to be on primary: Meridian ERP Phase 1, Meridian Security Audit, Meridian Annual License.
